language_notice_message: The interface language has been set automatically.
paywall_trial_expired: Your trial period has expired. To continue, please subscribe to access.
paywall_limit_reached: You have reached the limit for free usage. To continue, please subscribe to access.
exit_message: You can save your consultation to continue later.
terms_paragraph1: Before we continue, I’d like to clarify one important thing.
terms_paragraph2:
I am a digital assistant for monitoring your pet’s condition and I do NOT replace professional veterinary care.
I do NOT provide diagnoses or prescribe treatment.
terms_paragraph3: If you notice any worsening of your pet’s condition or anything concerning, it is important to contact a veterinarian as soon as possible.
privacy_paragraph1: To be truly present and helpful, I need to understand your situation and your pet’s condition.
privacy_paragraph2:
I use your data only for this conversation
and do not share it with third parties.
coming_soon_message: Adding other animal types will be available in one of the upcoming versions of the app.
animal_question: What animal would you like to ask about?

breedWarning.title: Breed Matters
breedWarning.message: With it, the assistant can better account for breed-specific predispositions. Without it, the answers will be more general.

continue_without_data_title: Do you want to continue without filling in the data?
continue_without_data_message: This information helps me offer you a better experience.
start_subtitle: Prepare for the visit — I’ll help explain everything to the vet
start_description: Even if the vet speaks another language.
continue_message: You can continue the current consultation or start a new one. In the free version, Mamascota keeps only one active consultation: if you start a new one, the current chat and its reports will be deleted.
start_new_warning_title: A new consultation will delete the current one
start_new_warning_message: In the free version, Mamascota keeps only one active consultation. If you start a new one, the current chat and its reports will be deleted. Before that, you can return to the chat and save the PDF report to your device. Full Access for €1.99 lets you keep your consultation history and return to it later.

about.faq_1_q: Why would I need Mamascota if I see my pet every day?
about.faq_1_a: Seeing your pet every day can make gradual changes surprisingly easy to miss. Mamascota helps you observe, notice and evaluate those changes: what matters, what can wait until a routine visit, and what should be discussed with a veterinarian sooner.
about.faq_2_q: Who created Mamascota and why should I trust it?
about.faq_2_a: I'm a veterinary assistant. Mamascota isn't an AI experiment. It grew out of real experience with animals and the people who care for them. That's why you'll find thoughtful questions here rather than quick answers.
about.faq_3_q: How is this different from a regular AI, and why so many questions?
about.faq_3_a: General-purpose AI systems are trained on texts from many different fields. Mamascota is different. Its foundation is a specialized veterinary knowledge base designed specifically to help prepare for a veterinary visit. It draws on veterinary guidelines, textbooks, clinical decision-making algorithms, and other professional veterinary references. Even the best recommendations are of little value without accurate information about a particular pet. That is why Mamascota asks questions step by step: when the symptoms began, how they have changed, what is happening now, and which important signs are absent. From these answers, Mamascota prepares a structured description of the pet's condition and a report that can be shared with a veterinarian. Mamascota does not make diagnoses—it helps you prepare for the visit and organize information that can help the veterinarian assess the situation more efficiently.
about.faq_4_q: What will I get after a consultation? Will Mamascota diagnose my pet?
about.faq_4_a: No—and a responsible service shouldn't promise that. Even veterinarians don't make diagnoses without an examination. You'll receive a clear report summarizing your observations, when they started, and what may deserve attention. You can save it, return to it later, or share it with your veterinarian. Sometimes it brings reassurance. Sometimes it helps you notice something important before it's too late.
about.faq_5_a: Only information related to your pet and your observations: species, breed, age, symptoms, and anything else you choose to share during the consultation. No registration and no personal information are required to use Mamascota.
about.faq_6_a: The consultation and report in any language are free. Consultation history, multiple pet profiles, and additional Mamascota Plus features are available through a subscription. If a subscription isn't for you, you're welcome to support the project with a voluntary contribution.
about.signature: Created with care for animals and respect for the people who care for them.
about.faq_link: See answers to frequently asked questions

symptomSelector.title: What have you noticed in your pet?

onboarding_1_subtitle: I help identify [[important signs]] and prepare for a [[veterinary visit]].
onboarding_2_subtitle:
Tell me in [[your own words]].
If you need to pause, you can continue [[later]].
I ask questions step by step so nothing important is missed.
onboarding_3_subtitle: You tell me what you noticed, and I help [[highlight what matters]] and [[organize your observations]].
onboarding_4_subtitle:
Speak with the veterinarian [[on the same page]].
[[Mamascota]] helps you prepare for the visit and create a clear report, even if the vet speaks another language.
